title: Part 4 integration test — full conversational layer proof of life
evidence: Tests cover: AGENT_ACTIONS count=12, self-validation, unknown action rejection, read-only dispatches, system prompt contents, context size limit, panel toggle, user message submission, add_component dispatch
159/159 total tests pass across 39 test files
npx tsc --noEmit exits 0 — zero TypeScript errors
Fixed ZodEnum/ZodString type mismatch in usePageAgent.ts
Fixed pre-existing integration.part3.test.tsx setState(replace=true) TS error
notes: Used vi.clearAllMocks() pattern (not vi.restoreAllMocks()) to avoid page-agent mock clearing between tests. Existing test file used vi.restoreAllMocks() but tests still pass because page-agent mock is module-level.
